nasb.text: He has come against Aiath, He has passed through Migron; At Michmash he deposited his baggage.

esv.text: He has come to Aiath; he has passed through Migron; at Michmash he stores his baggage;

cnv.text: 亞述人來到亞葉， 經過米磯崙； 在密抹存放軍隊行裝。

ccb.text: 亚述大军攻占了亚叶， 穿过米矶仑， 把辎重存放在密抹。

csbs.text: 亚述人来到亚叶， 经过米矶仑， 在米克玛安放辎重。
